_comment: Vercel overlay — set LUMO_REGISTRY_PATH=config/agents.registry.vercel.json on the Vercel project. base_url fields are templated; lib/agent-registry.ts → expandEnvRefs() substitutes ${VAR} against process.env at boot. Missing vars surface as '[registry] env var X unset' + skip, not a silent empty URL.

agents._notes: Lumo Intelligence Layer. Cloud Run/FastAPI system agent. Set LUMO_ML_AGENT_URL after deploying Lumo_ML_Service.
Flip enabled=false if you need to ship the shell without flight (e.g. during Duffel Seller-of-Travel review). The shell boots, the flight tools drop out of the system prompt, food keeps working.

Restaurant Agent runs mock-first until OpenTable partner onboarding lands. Set LUMO_RESTAURANT_AGENT_URL on the Vercel project to the deployed agent host; OPENTABLE_PARTNER_ID + OPENTABLE_API_KEY live on the restaurant agent's project, not here.

Hotel Agent runs mock-first. Amadeus ships a self-serve test API so partner gating is not a blocker — once AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID + AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET land on the hotel agent's project, the façade flips reads to the real client without code changes here. Set LUMO_HOTEL_AGENT_URL on the Vercel project to the deployed agent host.
Open Weather Agent (Open-Meteo + NWS). Public read-only data, no per-user auth. Deploy Lumo_Open_Weather_Agent_Web to Vercel and set LUMO_OPEN_WEATHER_AGENT_URL on this project.
Open Maps Agent (Nominatim + OSRM). Public read-only data. Set LUMO_OPEN_MAPS_AGENT_URL once deployed.
Open EV Charging Agent (Open Charge Map). Requires OPENCHARGEMAP_API_KEY on the agent's own project. Set LUMO_OPEN_EV_CHARGING_AGENT_URL once deployed.
Open Events Agent (Wikidata + optional Ticketmaster). Set LUMO_OPEN_EVENTS_AGENT_URL once deployed; optional TICKETMASTER_API_KEY on the agent's own project.
Open Attractions Agent (Nominatim + Overpass). Public read-only data. Set LUMO_OPEN_ATTRACTIONS_AGENT_URL once deployed.
